name: Butterfield Woven Novelty Area Rug Navy - Threshold™
description: You're sure to make an impression with your decor with this Geometric Woven Novelty Rug from Threshold™. This woven indoor area rug features a classic medallion pattern in tan against a slightly darker background, creating a compelling look you'll love. The simple rectangular shape and flat-pile construction make it a versatile addition to a variety of rooms and decor styles. Plus, it's made from a sturdy fabric, providing easy maintenance and plenty of lasting use. A great option for adding a combination of functionality and style to your decor, this woven area rug can easily be used in nearly any room in your home, and the latex backing helps it stay in place.
